```java
package com.example.service;

import javax.imageio.ImageIO;
import java.awt.image.BufferedImage;
import java.net.MalformedURLException;
import java.net.URL;
import java.io.IOException;

public class ImageService {
    public boolean processImageFromUrl(String imageUrl) {
        try {
            URL url = new URL(imageUrl);
            BufferedImage image = ImageIO.read(url);
            return image != null;
        } catch (MalformedURLException e) {
            return false;
        } catch (IOException e) {
            return false;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
}
```

```java
package com.example.service;

import java.awt.image.BufferedImage;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.net.HttpURLConnection;
import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.URLConnection;
import javax.imageio.ImageIO;

public class ImageService {

    public boolean processImageFromUrl(String imageUrl) {
        try {
            URL url = new URL(imageUrl);
            String protocol = url.getProtocol();
            
            // Only allow HTTP and HTTPS
            if (!protocol.equals("http") && !protocol.equals("https")) {
                throw new SSRFException("Invalid protocol: " + protocol);
            }
            
            // Validate initial host
            if (isPrivateHost(url.getHost())) {
                throw new SSRFException("Private host detected: " + url.getHost());
            }
            
            // Follow redirects and validate final URL
            URL finalUrl = getFinalUrl(url);
            String finalProtocol = finalUrl.getProtocol();
            if (!finalProtocol.equals("http") && !finalProtocol.equals("https")) {
                throw new SSRFException("Invalid final protocol: " + finalProtocol);
            }
            
            // Validate final host
            if (isPrivateHost(finalUrl.getHost())) {
                throw new SSRFException("Private host detected in redirect: " + finalUrl.getHost());
            }
            
            // Download and validate image with timeouts
            URLConnection connection = finalUrl.openConnection();
            connection.setConnectTimeout(1000);  // 1 second connection timeout
            connection.setReadTimeout(1000);       // 1 second read timeout
            
            try (InputStream inputStream = connection.getInputStream()) {
                BufferedImage image = ImageIO.read(inputStream);
                if (image != null) {
                    System.out.println("Image processed successfully: " + image.getWidth() + "x" + image.getHeight());
                    return true;
                }
            }
        } catch (SSRFException e) {
            System.err.println("SSRF protection triggered: " + e.getMessage());
        } catch (IOException e) {
            System.err.println("Error processing image: " + e.getMessage());
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    private URL getFinalUrl(URL url) throws IOException {
        HttpURLConnection connection = null;
        URL currentUrl = url;
        int maxRedirects = 5;
        
        for (int redirectCount = 0; redirectCount < maxRedirects; redirectCount++) {
            connection = (HttpURLConnection) currentUrl.openConnection();
            connection.setInstanceFollowRedirects(false);
            connection.setConnectTimeout(1000);
            connection.setReadTimeout(1000);
            
            int responseCode = connection.getResponseCode();
            
            // Handle redirect responses (300-399)
            if (responseCode >= 300 && responseCode < 400) {
                String location = connection.getHeaderField("Location");
                if (location == null) {
                    break;
                }
                
                // Resolve relative URLs
                if (!location.startsWith("http://") && !location.startsWith("https://")) {
                    URL base = currentUrl;
                    location = new URL(base, location).toString();
                }
                
                currentUrl = new URL(location);
                connection.disconnect();
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        return currentUrl;
    }
    
    private boolean isPrivateHost(String host) {
        try {
            // Check for literal IP addresses first
            InetAddress address = InetAddress.getByName(host);
            if (address.isLoopbackAddress() || address.isSiteLocalAddress() 
                || address.isLinkLocalAddress() || address.isAnyLocalAddress()
                || address.isMulticastAddress()) {
                return true;
            }
            
            // Additional check for IPv4 addresses
            if (address.getAddress().length == 4) {  // IPv4
                byte[] bytes = address.getAddress();
                // 10.x.x.x
                if (bytes[0] == 10) return true;
                // 172.16.x.x - 172.31.x.x
                if (bytes[0] == (byte)172 && bytes[1] >= 16 && bytes[1] <= 31) return true;
                // 192.168.x.x
                if (bytes[0] == (byte)192 && bytes[1] == (byte)168) return true;
                // 127.x.x.x (loopback)
                if (bytes[0] == 127) return true;
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // Fallback to regex for literal IP check
            return isPrivateIpLiteral(host);
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    private boolean isPrivateIpLiteral(String ip) {
        if (ip == null) return false;
        String[] parts = ip.split("\\.");
        if (parts.length != 4) return false;
        
        try {
            int a = Integer.parseInt(parts[0]);
            int b = Integer.parseInt(parts[1]);
            int c = Integer.parseInt(parts[2]);
            int d = Integer.parseInt(parts[3]);
            
            // Check private ranges
            if (a == 10) return true;
            if (a == 172 && b >= 16 && b <= 31) return true;
            if (a == 192 && b == 168) return true;
            if (a == 127) return true;
        } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
            return false;
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    private static class SSRFException extends Exception {
        public SSRFException(String message) {
            super(message);
        }
    }
}
```

1. Checking protocol is HTTP/HTTPS only
2. Resolving hostname to IP address

The implementation uses Java's `InetAddress.isGlobal()` method to validate public IP addresses.

```xml
package com.example.service;

import java.awt.image.BufferedImage;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.MalformedURLException;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.UnknownHostException;
import javax.imageio.ImageIO;

public class ImageService {

    public boolean processImageFromUrl(String imageUrl) {
        try {
            validateUrl(imageUrl);
        } catch (SecurityException e) {
            System.err.println("Security error: " + e.getMessage());
            return false;
        }

        try {
            URL url = new URL(imageUrl);
            BufferedImage image = ImageIO.read(url);
            if (image != null) {
                System.out.println("Image processed successfully: " + image.getWidth() + "x" + image.getHeight());
                return true;
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            System.err.println("Error processing image from URL: " + e.getMessage());
        }
        return false;
    }

    private void validateUrl(String imageUrl) throws SecurityException {
        try {
            URL url = new URL(imageUrl);
            String protocol = url.getProtocol();
            if (!"http".equalsIgnoreCase(protocol) && !"https".equalsIgnoreCase(protocol)) {
                throw new SecurityException("Disallowed protocol: " + protocol);
            }

            String host = url.getHost();
            if (host == null) {
                throw new SecurityException("No host found");
            }

            InetAddress addr = InetAddress.getByName(host);
            if (!addr.isGlobal()) {
                throw new SecurityException("Disallowed address: " + host);
            }
        } catch (MalformedURLException e) {
            throw new SecurityException("Malformed URL: " + imageUrl, e);
        } catch (UnknownHostException e) {
            throw new SecurityException("Unknown host: " + host, e);
        }
    }
}
</fixed_code>
```
